rulings.Case Title: RICKY WASH SR. et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, SEPTEMBER 28, 2007, LINE 2. DEFENDANT HILL BROTHERS CHEMICAL COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT DID NOT SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF IN THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT DEPOSE THE WITNESSES IDENTIFIED BY PLAINTIFF AND HAS NOT SHOWN THAT SUCH WITNESSES COULD NOT BE CONTACTED. PLAINTIFF ALSO HAS ESTABLISHED TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT BASED ON THE TESTIMONY OF CARPENTER, WERNSMANN, AY AND COHEN. THE OBJECTIONS TO AY AND COHEN DECLARATIONS ARE OVERRULED. =(302/PJM/SN-X)
